tasks.title: Add PointerEvent polyfill to test/setup.tsx
tasks.description:
Add the MockPointerEvent class and HTMLElement prototype patches to test/setup.tsx BEFORE the existing vi.mock() blocks. This fixes Radix UI Select/Popover/Dialog not opening in JSDOM tests.

Files to modify: apps/admin/test/setup.tsx

Add:
- class MockPointerEvent extends Event (with button, ctrlKey, pointerType)
- window.PointerEvent = MockPointerEvent as any
- window.HTMLElement.prototype.scrollIntoView = vi.fn()
- window.HTMLElement.prototype.hasPointerCapture = vi.fn()
- window.HTMLElement.prototype.releasePointerCapture = vi.fn()

Test: Run existing tests to verify nothing breaks. Add a small test in test/setup-validation.test.ts that verifies window.PointerEvent is defined.

subtasks.title: Add MockPointerEvent class before vi.mock blocks
Run existing tests to verify no regressions

tasks.title: Add @repo/icons Proxy mock to test/setup.tsx
tasks.description:
Add a global Proxy mock for @repo/icons to test/setup.tsx. Currently this mock is duplicated in 3 individual test files (Header.test.tsx, Sidebar.test.tsx, navigation.test.tsx). The Proxy returns a functional component stub for ANY icon name.

Files to modify: apps/admin/test/setup.tsx

Add vi.mock('@repo/icons', ...) with Proxy that returns <span data-testid={`icon-${prop}`} aria-hidden='true' /> for any prop.

Test: Run existing tests — the 3 files with local @repo/icons mocks should still pass (local mocks override global). Verify no new warnings.

subtasks.title: Run existing tests to verify compatibility

tasks.title: Create test helpers (renderWithProviders, createTestQueryClient, waitForLoading)
tasks.description:
Create 3 helper files in apps/admin/test/helpers/:

1. create-test-query-client.ts — exports createTestQueryClient() with retry: false, gcTime: Infinity
2. render-with-providers.tsx — exports renderWithProviders() wrapping in QueryClientProvider + ToastProvider. Returns { ...renderResult, queryClient }
3. wait-for-loading.ts — exports waitForLoadingToFinish() that waits for skeletons/pulse animations to disappear

Files to create:
- apps/admin/test/helpers/create-test-query-client.ts
- apps/admin/test/helpers/render-with-providers.tsx
- apps/admin/test/helpers/wait-for-loading.ts

Test: Import each helper in a test file and verify they work. No functional test needed yet — they'll be validated by smoke tests.

tasks.title: Create admin-handlers.ts for paginated entities
tasks.description:
Create apps/admin/test/mocks/admin-handlers.ts with MSW handlers for all paginated admin endpoints.

Entities: accommodations, destinations, events, event-locations, event-organizers, accommodation-amenities, accommodation-features, destination-attractions, sponsors, posts, tags, users, billing/subscriptions, billing/invoices, billing/payments, billing/promo-codes, billing/owner-promotions, billing/sponsorships, billing/webhook-events, billing/notification-logs.

Each entity gets: GET list (mockPaginatedResponse), GET :id (mockSuccessResponse), POST (201), PATCH :id (200), DELETE :id (200).

Import fixtures from test/fixtures/ and response factories from handlers.ts.

Export getAdminHandlers() returning the handler array.

Files to create: apps/admin/test/mocks/admin-handlers.ts

Test: Import and verify the handler array has the expected length.

tasks.title: CRUD tests: Accommodations create flow

1. Submits form with valid data → POST to API → navigates to detail
2. Shows validation errors when form submitted empty → no API call

4. Disables submit button while mutation is pending

Use MSW server.use() for POST handler, renderWithProviders, userEvent.setup().

tasks.title: Table interaction tests: Accommodations sort + pagination
tasks.description:
Create apps/admin/test/integration/accommodations.table.test.tsx with table interaction tests:

2. Sends page=2 when next page button clicked
3. Navigates to edit page when row edit action clicked

Capture API requests via MSW handler to verify query params.

IMPORTANT: Sort format is DataTableSort: [{id: string, desc: boolean}], serialized as JSON in query param 'sort'.

Files to create: apps/admin/test/integration/accommodations.table.test.tsx

Test: All 3 tests pass.

tasks.title: Final validation: run full test suite and verify coverage
tasks.description:
Run the complete admin test suite (pnpm test in apps/admin). Verify:

1. All new tests pass (smoke + CRUD + table + dialog)
2. All existing tests still pass (no regressions)
3. Coverage meets the 70% thresholds defined in vitest.config.ts
4. No lint or typecheck errors in test files

Run: pnpm test, pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint in apps/admin.

Fix any issues found.
